CustomField.description: Indicates whether the utilization is filed for a partial month. Used in Utilization Studio
CustomField.formula: IF(AND( leaseworks__End_Date_F__c == leaseworks__Month_Ending__c, leaseworks__Start_Date_F__c == Date(YEAR(leaseworks__Month_Ending__c),MONTH(leaseworks__Month_Ending__c),1) ), false, true)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Indicates whether the utilization is filed for a partial month
CustomField.label: Partial Month
